description_long: A male security guard stands upright with arms extended horizontally, wearing a black button-up shirt and matching black pants. He has a neatly groomed beard and mustache, and his hair is pulled back into a long braid. The guard sports dark sunglasses, adding to his authoritative appearance, and wears dark shoes suitable for urban environments. His uniform is simple and unadorned, with no visible insignia, badges, or equipment. The overall look is professional and formal, with a focus on practicality and presence.
description: A male security guard in a black uniform with sunglasses and a braided hairstyle, standing with arms outstretched. The attire is formal and unadorned, emphasizing authority and professionalism.
description_view_0: Front view showing the guard's face, sunglasses, beard, and full uniform with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, sunglasses, and the length of the braid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, full braid, and the back of the uniform.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, sunglasses, and the braid from the opposite side.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal black uniform consisting of a button-up shirt and matching black pants, complemented by dark shoes and sunglasses. The shirt is untucked and lacks visible insignia, patches, or a tie, and the overall appearance is standardized and professional. The guard's hair is styled in a long braid, and the uniform is devoid of any decorative elements or accessories.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, projecting a neutral and ready demeanor.
